<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sìng]][[de:Feuer-Drache]][[hak:Piáng-sìn]][[ja:丙辰]][[ko:병진 (간지)]][[vi:Bính Thìn]][[za:Bingjsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sîn]][[zh-yue:丙辰]][[zh:丙辰]]

'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as 丙辰''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 53rd combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Wood Rabbit]] and followed by [[Yin Fire Snake]]. In the context of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Hinoe (丙)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon (辰)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]]) (火生土).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Dragon (丙辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san4
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: heishin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongjin (병진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Thìn

==Years of Yang Fire Dragon==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 56 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yang Fire Dragon]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Fire Dragon (丙辰)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 56|56 AD]]
* [[AD 116|116 AD]]
* [[176|176 AD]]
* [[236|236 AD]]
* [[296|296 AD]]
* [[356|356 AD]]
* [[416|416 AD]]
* [[476|476 AD]]
* [[536|536 AD]]
* [[596|596 AD]]
* [[656|656 AD]]
* [[716|716 AD]]
* [[776|776 AD]]
* [[836|836 AD]]
* [[896|896 AD]]
* [[956|956 AD]]
|
* [[1016|1016 AD]]
* [[1076|1076 AD]]
* [[1136|1136 AD]]
* [[1196|1196 AD]]
* [[1256|1256 AD]]
* [[1316|1316 AD]]
* [[1376|1376 AD]]
* [[1436|1436 AD]]
* [[1496|1496 AD]]
* [[1556|1556 AD]]
* [[1616|1616 AD]]
* [[1676|1676 AD]]
* [[1736|1736 AD]]
* [[1796|1796 AD]]
* [[1856|1856 AD]]
* [[1916|1916 AD]]
* [[1976|1976 AD]]
|
* [[2036 AD]]
* [[2090s|2096 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2156 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2216 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2276 AD]]
* [[2336 AD]]
* [[2396 AD]]
* [[2456 AD]]
* [[2516 AD]]
* [[2576 AD]]
* [[2636 AD]]
* [[2696 AD]]
* [[2756 AD]]
* [[2816 AD]]
* [[2876 AD]]
* [[2936 AD]]
* [[2996 AD]]
|}
==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoto (癸)]] or [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]]), the month of [[March]] is designated as the month of [[Yang Fire Dragon]]. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for [[Yang Fire Dragon]] is the gap day of [[Hassen]].

==See Also==
<!--Yang Fire Dragon--><!--Yang Fire Dragon-->

{{wikidata link|Q904721}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
